steps.title: Multiply by the denominator and expand
steps.content:
Starting with $V_B = \frac{V_P}{1-H}$, multiply both sides by $(1-H)$:
$$V_B(1-H) = V_P$$
Expand the left side:
$$V_B - V_B H = V_P$$

steps.title: Isolate and solve for H
steps.content:
Rearrange to collect all terms with $H$ on one side:
$$V_B - V_P = V_B H$$
Divide both sides by $V_B$:
$$H = \frac{V_B - V_P}{V_B}$$
Split the fraction:
$$H = 1 - \frac{V_P}{V_B}$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
